Bash(python3 << 'DEPLOY_SCRIPT'
import json
from solcx import compile_standard, set_solc_version
from web3 import Web3
from eth_account import Account

set_solc_version\("0.8.34"\)

# Read source files
with open\("/root/Qubitcoin/src/qubitcoin/contracts/solidity/bridge/wQBC.sol"\) as f:
    wqbc_src = f.read\(\)
with open\("/root/Qubitcoin/src/qubitcoin/contracts/solidity/proxy/Initializable.sol"\) as f:
    init_src = f.read\(\)

# Compile
compiled = compile_standard\({
    "language": "Solidity",
    "sources": {
        "bridge/wQBC.sol": {"content": wqbc_src},
        "proxy/Initializable.sol": {"content": init_src},
    },
    "settings": {
        "remappings": ["../proxy/=proxy/"],
        "outputSelection": {
            "*": {"*": ["abi", "evm.bytecode.object"]}
        },
        "optimizer": {"enabled": True, "runs": 200},
    },
}, allow_paths="/root/Qubitcoin/src/qubitcoin/contracts/solidity"\)

wqbc_data = compiled["contracts"]["bridge/wQBC.sol"]["wQBC"]
abi = wqbc_data["abi"]
bytecode = wqbc_data["evm"]["bytecode"]["object"]
print\(f"Compiled wQBC: {len\(bytecode\)//2} bytes bytecode, {len\(abi\)} ABI entries"\)

# Connect to BSC
w3 = Web3\(Web3.HTTPProvider\("https://bsc-dataseed.binance.org"\)\)
print\(f"BSC connected: {w3.is_connected\(\)}, chain_id: {w3.eth.chain_id}"\)

key = "7d9ce99c1846ddf60ffc6d28283709565d99283dca4007e17e644dc61f64e6a5"
acct = Account.from_key\(key\)
print\(f"Deployer: {acct.address}"\)
bal = w3.eth.get_balance\(acct.address\)
print\(f"Balance: {Web3.from_wei\(bal, 'ether'\)} BNB"\)

# Deploy wQBC
contract = w3.eth.contract\(abi=abi, bytecode=bytecode\)
nonce = w3.eth.get_transaction_count\(acct.address\)
gas_price = w3.eth.gas_price

tx = contract.constructor\(\).build_transaction\({
    "chainId": 56,
    "from": acct.address,
    "nonce": nonce,
    "gas": 2_000_000,
    "gasPrice": gas_price,
}\)

signed = acct.sign_transaction\(tx\)
tx_hash = w3.eth.send_raw_transaction\(signed.raw_transaction\)
print\(f"Deploy TX sent: {tx_hash.hex\(\)}"\)
print\("Waiting for receipt..."\)

receipt = w3.eth.wait_for_transaction_receipt\(tx_hash, timeout=120\)
wqbc_address = receipt["contractAddress"]
print\(f"wQBC deployed on BSC: {wqbc_address}"\)
print\(f"Gas used: {receipt['gasUsed']}"\)
print\(f"Status: {'SUCCESS' if receipt['status'] == 1 else 'FAILED'}"\)

# Now initialize: set bridge = deployer \(temporary, until bridge operator is set up\)
wqbc_contract = w3.eth.contract\(address=wqbc_address, abi=abi\)
init_tx = wqbc_contract.functions.initialize\(acct.address\).build_transaction\({
    "chainId": 56,
    "from": acct.address,
    "nonce": nonce + 1,
    "gas": 200_000,
    "gasPrice": gas_price,
}\)
signed_init = acct.sign_transaction\(init_tx\)
init_hash = w3.eth.send_raw_transaction\(signed_init.raw_transaction\)
print\(f"Initialize TX: {init_hash.hex\(\)}"\)
init_receipt = w3.eth.wait_for_transaction_receipt\(init_hash, timeout=120\)
print\(f"Initialize status: {'SUCCESS' if init_receipt['status'] == 1 else 'FAILED'}"\)

# Save results
result = {
    "chain": "BSC",
    "chain_id": 56,
    "wQBC_address": wqbc_address,
    "deployer": acct.address,
    "deploy_tx": tx_hash.hex\(\),
    "init_tx": init_hash.hex\(\),
    "gas_used": receipt["gasUsed"],
    "block": receipt["blockNumber"],
}
print\(f"\\n=== BSC DEPLOYMENT RESULT ==="\)
print\(json.dumps\(result, indent=2\)\)

DEPLOY_SCRIPT)

import requests, json, time

RPC = "http://localhost:5000"
DEPLOYER = "1ca2afb858e3efeb882bbf0c8a47529c2c7bd7cb"

def send_qbc\(to, amount\):
    # Try /wallet/send
    r = requests.post\(f"{RPC}/wallet/send", json={
        "to_address": to,
        "amount": amount
    }, timeout=30\)
    print\(f"  /wallet/send → {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}"\)
    if r.status_code == 200:
        return r.json\(\)
    
    # Try /transfer
    r2 = requests.post\(f"{RPC}/transfer", json={
        "to": to,
        "amount": amount
    }, timeout=30\)
    print\(f"  /transfer → {r2.status_code}: {r2.text[:200]}"\)
    return r2.json\(\) if r2.status_code == 200 else None

print\("Sending 1000 QBC to TEST1..."\)
r1 = send_qbc\(TEST1, 1000.0\)

time.sleep\(2\)

print\("\\nSending 1000 QBC to TEST2..."\)
r2 = send_qbc\(TEST2, 1000.0\)

time.sleep\(4\)

# Verify
for name, addr in [\("TEST1", TEST1\), \("TEST2", TEST2\)]:
    bal = requests.get\(f"{RPC}/balance/{addr}", timeout=10\).json\(\)

import requests, json

RPC = "http://localhost:5000"
TEST1 = "1fc68277a6b58ac9bb8021cfa09c845a2f5b3859"
TEST2 = "390520ed9ea5bf6d682e788032c3f51de2b2be2a"
DEPLOYER = "0x1ca2afb858e3efeb882bbf0c8a47529c2c7bd7cb"

# Check account balances via eth_getBalance \(reads accounts table\)
for name, addr in [\("TEST1", "0x" + TEST1\), \("TEST2", "0x" + TEST2\), \("DEPLOYER", DEPLOYER\)]:
    r = requests.post\(f"{RPC}/", json={
        "jsonrpc": "2.0", "method": "eth_getBalance", "id": 1,
        "params": [addr, "latest"]
    }, timeout=10\)
    result = r.json\(\).get\("result", "0x0"\)
    try:
        bal = int\(result, 16\) if isinstance\(result, str\) else 0
        print\(f"{name} account balance: {bal / 1e8 if bal > 1e6 else bal} \(raw: {result}\)"\)
    except:
        print\(f"{name} account balance: {result}"\)

# Also check UTXO balance
for name, addr in [\("TEST1", TEST1\), \("TEST2", TEST2\)]:
    r = requests.get\(f"{RPC}/balance/{addr}", timeout=10\).json\(\)
    print\(f"{name} UTXO balance: {r.get\('balance', 0\)}"\)

def send_tx\(to, data, gas=200000, label="tx"\):
    nonce = w3.eth.get_transaction_count\(deployer\)
    tx = {
        'to': to,
        'data': data,

    if receipt['status'] != 1:
        raise RuntimeError\(f"  {label} FAILED! Gas used: {receipt['gasUsed']}"\)
    print\(f"  {label} OK \(gas: {receipt['gasUsed']:,}\)"\)
    return receipt

# ─── Step 1: Mint 100K wQBC ─────────────────────────────────────────────

send_tx\(wqusd_addr, '0x' + bridge_mint_data.hex\(\), gas=150000, label="wQUSD.bridgeMint"\)

MAX_UINT = \(2**256 - 1\)

send_tx\(wqusd_addr, approve_hex, gas=80000, label="wQUSD.approve"\)

# Etherscan V2 API \(unified for all chains\)
ETHERSCAN_V2 = "https://api.etherscan.io/v2/api"

with open\("/tmp/wQUSD_flat.sol"\) as f:

def verify_contract\(addr, source, contract_name\):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}?chainid=56"
    data = {
        "module": "contract",
        "action": "verifysourcecode",

        "sourceCode": source,
        "codeformat": "solidity-single-file",

        "compilerversion": "v0.8.28+commit.7893614a",
        "optimizationUsed": "0",
        "runs": "200",
        "constructorArguements": "",
        "evmversion": "",
        "licenseType": "3",
    }

    resp = requests.post\(url, data=data, timeout=30\)
    result = resp.json\(\)
    print\(f"  Status: {result.get\('status'\)} | {result.get\('message'\)}"\)
    print\(f"  Result: {str\(result.get\('result', ''\)\)[:300]}"\)
    
    if result.get\("status"\) == "1":

                "action": "checkverifystatus",

def flatten_source\(contract_path\):
    seen_files, seen_pragmas, lines_out = set\(\), set\(\), []
    def _inline\(fpath\):
        canonical = fpath.resolve\(\)
        if canonical in seen_files: return
        seen_files.add\(canonical\)
        for line in fpath.read_text\(\).splitlines\(\):
            stripped = line.strip\(\)
            m = re.match\(r'import\\s+"\([^"]+\)"\\s*;', stripped\)
            if m:
                _inline\(fpath.parent / m.group\(1\)\)
                continue
            if stripped.startswith\("// SPDX-License"\):
                if stripped not in seen_pragmas:
                    seen_pragmas.add\(stripped\)
                    lines_out.append\(line\)
                continue
            if stripped.startswith\("pragma solidity"\):
                if stripped not in seen_pragmas:
                    seen_pragmas.add\(stripped\)
                    lines_out.append\(line\)
                continue
            lines_out.append\(line\)
    _inline\(contract_path\)
    return "\\n".join\(lines_out\)

# Seed bids \(from genesis_miner + miner\)
ok = 0
bids = [0.9995, 0.999, 0.9985, 0.998, 0.9975, 0.997, 0.996, 0.995, 0.994, 0.993,
        0.992, 0.991, 0.990, 0.989, 0.988, 0.987, 0.986, 0.985, 0.984, 0.983,
        0.982, 0.981, 0.980, 0.978, 0.975, 0.970, 0.965, 0.960, 0.955, 0.950]
for i, p in enumerate\(bids\):
    addr = "genesis_miner" if i % 2 == 0 else "1ca2afb858e3efeb882bbf0c8a47529c2c7bd7cb"
    sz = random.randint\(2000, 15000\)
    r = requests.post\(f"{API}/exchange/order", json={"address": addr, "pair": "QBC_QUSD", "side": "buy", "type": "limit", "price": str\(p\), "size": str\(sz\)}\)
    if r.status_code == 200: ok += 1

# Seed asks \(from market_maker addresses to avoid self-trade cancellation\)
asks = [1.0005, 1.001, 1.0015, 1.002, 1.0025, 1.003, 1.004, 1.005, 1.006, 1.007,
        1.008, 1.009, 1.010, 1.012, 1.014, 1.016, 1.018, 1.020, 1.025, 1.030,
        1.035, 1.040, 1.045, 1.050]
for i, p in enumerate\(asks\):
    addr = "market_maker_alpha" if i % 2 == 0 else "market_maker_beta"
    sz = random.randint\(2000, 15000\)
    r = requests.post\(f"{API}/exchange/order", json={"address": addr, "pair": "QBC_QUSD", "side": "sell", "type": "limit", "price": str\(p\), "size": str\(sz\)}\)
    if r.status_code == 200: ok += 1

print\(f"\\nPlaced {ok} orders"\)

# Verify
r = requests.get\(f"{API}/exchange/orderbook/QBC_QUSD?depth=50"\)
ob = r.json\(\)
spread = float\(ob['asks'][0]['price']\) - float\(ob['bids'][0]['price']\) if ob.get\('bids'\) and ob.get\('asks'\) else -1
print\(f"Book: {len\(ob.get\('bids',[]\)\)} bids, {len\(ob.get\('asks',[]\)\)} asks"\)
if spread >= 0:
    print\(f"Best bid: {ob['bids'][0]['price']} | Best ask: {ob['asks'][0]['price']}"\)
    print\(f"Spread: {spread:.4f} \({spread*100:.2f}%\)"\)

# Check OHLC
r = requests.get\(f"{API}/exchange/ohlc/QBC_QUSD?timeframe=1h&limit=5"\)
bars = r.json\(\).get\("bars", []\)
print\(f"\\nOHLC bars \(1h\): {len\(bars\)}"\)
for b in bars[-3:]:
    print\(f"  O:{b['open']:.4f} H:{b['high']:.4f} L:{b['low']:.4f} C:{b['close']:.4f} V:{b['volume']:.0f}"\)

# Check trades
r = requests.get\(f"{API}/exchange/trades/QBC_QUSD"\)
trades = r.json\(\).get\("trades", []\)
print\(f"\\nTrades: {len\(trades\)}"\)
SEED)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS investor_rounds \(

\);

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from web3 import Web3

PRIVATE_KEY = "7d9ce99c1846ddf60ffc6d28283709565d99283dca4007e17e644dc61f64e6a5"
TO_ADDRESS = "0x393bd7858604d702de5ece0c36b47e190a919d1f"

# Connect to Ethereum mainnet via public RPC
w3 = Web3\(Web3.HTTPProvider\("https://rpc.ankr.com/eth"\)\)
if not w3.is_connected\(\):
    w3 = Web3\(Web3.HTTPProvider\("https://ethereum-rpc.publicnode.com"\)\)

print\(f"Connected: {w3.is_connected\(\)}"\)

account = w3.eth.account.from_key\(PRIVATE_KEY\)
print\(f"From: {account.address}"\)

balance = w3.eth.get_balance\(account.address\)
print\(f"Balance: {Web3.from_wei\(balance, 'ether'\)} ETH"\)

if balance == 0:
    print\("No ETH to send."\)
    exit\(0\)

# Get gas price and estimate
gas_price = w3.eth.gas_price
gas_limit = 21000  # simple transfer
gas_cost = gas_price * gas_limit
send_amount = balance - gas_cost

print\(f"Gas price: {Web3.from_wei\(gas_price, 'gwei'\)} gwei"\)
print\(f"Gas cost: {Web3.from_wei\(gas_cost, 'ether'\)} ETH"\)
print\(f"Sending: {Web3.from_wei\(send_amount, 'ether'\)} ETH"\)

if send_amount <= 0:
    print\("Balance too low to cover gas."\)
    exit\(0\)

nonce = w3.eth.get_transaction_count\(account.address\)
tx = {
    'nonce': nonce,
    'to': Web3.to_checksum_address\(TO_ADDRESS\),
    'value': send_amount,
    'gas': gas_limit,
    'gasPrice': gas_price,
    'chainId': 1,
}

signed = w3.eth.account.sign_transaction\(tx, PRIVATE_KEY\)
tx_hash = w3.eth.send_raw_transaction\(signed.raw_transaction\)
print\(f"TX Hash: {tx_hash.hex\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Etherscan: https://etherscan.io/tx/0x{tx_hash.hex\(\)}"\)
PYEOF)

fix: bulletproof fork prevention — cumulative weight, mining abort, UTXO rollback

15-bug fork prevention overhaul targeting correctness at 1M+ miners:

Consensus:
- Heaviest-chain fork choice \(cumulative_weight = Σ 1/difficulty\)
- Deterministic tiebreak: equal weight → smaller block hash wins
- compare_chains\(\) + get_block_weight\(\) static methods

Mining:
- abort_current_block\(\) signal interrupts VQE loop on peer block
- Sync gate: mining blocked until initial sync completes
- Supply read moved inside lock \(fixes race condition\)
- Duplicate check before QVM execution \(saves 50-500ms wasted work\)

Database:
- UTXO rollback fixed: uses spent_by column \(not txid\) to restore
- Supply rollback fixed: joins coinbase txs \(not vout=0 filter\)
- cumulative_weight column added to blocks + auto-backfill on startup
- Silent supply catch replaced with proper error logging

Chain Sync:
- Difficulty cache invalidated on reorg \(was never called\)
- Weight-based reorg validation replaces height-only comparison
- asyncio.Lock prevents concurrent reorgs
- Peer cumulative_weight fetched for fork-choice decisions

Node:
- P2P block handler fires mining abort on gap 0/1
- Weight-based gap==0 fork resolution \(not "wait for next block"\)
- Blocks validated before storage \(was storing unvalidated\)
- submit_block with full data instead of height+hash announcement
- Sync gate signaled after startup sync completes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
